title: Mermaid diagram embedding components for AI UI
purpose: Provides components for displaying Mermaid diagrams inline within AI UI applications. Exports a diagram embed component that renders Mermaid syntax as visual diagrams.
module_context: Exports the DiagramEmbed component and its associated props type for rendering Mermaid diagrams in the UI.

steps.content: Receive the diagram content and configuration through props.
Render the Mermaid diagram using the provided content.
Apply any specified styling or configuration options.
Display the rendered diagram in the component's output.
